description: Create a content slide on affordability business considerations with a central visual and four surrounding strategic bullet lists in a full layout.

header.headline: Businesses need to develop dual strategies to defend their relevance and margins across resilient high-income consumers and stretched lower-income households

steps.label: Rethink pricing architecture
steps.sub:
Lower-income segments: uniform pricing risks losing volume - companies need value tiers, bundled offerings and reduced pack sizes
High-income segments: premium pricing and differentiated SKUs can protect margins for consumers willing to pay for quality
